close_line: What's the best 20 minutes next week to walk you through the SMB version — Tuesday 11 or Thursday 2?

turns.speaker: Rep
turns.text: I noticed you opened a second location six months ago — who is approving expense reports across both stores now?

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: Honestly? My bookkeeper. She is drowning in receipts at Q-end.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: We already have a corporate Visa from our bank, though.

turns.speaker: Rep
turns.text: So you've got the card-issuing side sorted. What's not working about the way it logs receipts back to your bookkeeper?

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: Yeah, that. She is overwhelmed by Q-end every single quarter.

turns.speaker: Rep
turns.text: You mentioned the bookkeeper is overwhelmed by Q-end — let me book 20 minutes Tuesday 11 to show your accountant the Xero sync. Tuesday 11 or Thursday 2?

turns.speaker: Rep
turns.text: [Calendar invite "Maria + bookkeeper · Xero sync demo" sent during call]

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: Tuesday 11 works. I'll forward to Sarah.

turns.speaker: Rep
turns.text: Perfect — Sarah will get the invite in about a minute. Talk Tuesday.

close_line: Want me to show you the difference in FX cost vs Brex on your last month's spend? 10 minutes — Tuesday 11 or Thursday 2?

turns.speaker: Rep
turns.text: I see you closed your Series-B last quarter — how are you handling per-employee card issuance for your new hires?

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: We already use Brex. We are fine.

turns.speaker: Rep
turns.text: Brex is great if you're a US-based startup with USD-only spend. You're EU now though — what does your FX exposure look like on AWS and the SaaS subscriptions?

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: Honestly, I have no idea. Probably bad.

turns.speaker: Rep
turns.text: Want me to show you the difference in FX cost vs Brex on your last month's spend? 10 minutes — Tuesday 11 or Thursday 2?

turns.speaker: Rep
turns.text: [Calendar invite "Tom + L.D. · FX delta · 10-min product-fit" sent during call]

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: Tuesday 11. Send it.

close_line: I'll follow up next week with some times.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: Sounds interesting, send me something?

turns.speaker: Rep
turns.text: I'll follow up next week with some times.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: Sure, bye.

close_line: I'll email you some times tomorrow.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: OK, the FX thing is real. What do we do next?

turns.speaker: Rep
turns.text: I'll email you some times tomorrow morning.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: Alright.

turns.speaker: Note
turns.text: Invite never sent that day. Buyer never replied to follow-up sequence.
